channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - East Pattaya / Darkside venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai, dive, golf, and sport venues in East Pattaya / Darkside, Pattaya.

item.title: Rambaa Somdet M16 Muay Thai & MMA
item.description: Personal camp of Rambaa M16 — Thailand's first MMA world champion (Shooto Flyweight 2009) + Muay Thai legend. Cage on site. 100m from Sor Klinmee.

item.title: Sanit Sport Club
item.description: Two-zone Mabprachan club: comprehensive fitness centre + dedicated Muay Thai gym. 1,000+ members. Trainer Kru Rung — 40 years Lumpinee/Rajadamnern. Resident MAX Muay Thai champion Krasuk. 4 daily MT sessions.

item.title: Siam Country Club Pattaya
item.description: Multiple championship courses: Old Course (1970, Top 100 world), Plantation, Waterside. Asia's premier golf destination.

item.title: Manta Kids Pattaya (IG Center)
item.description: Premier kids swim academy. Head coach is former Thai national swimmer. ASCTA-certified instructors. ฿9,900/quarter (10 sessions).

item.title: Kombat Group Thailand
item.description: All-inclusive multi-discipline camp. Christian Daghio's legacy (190 MT fights, 7x World Champ). Muay Thai+Boxing+MMA+BJJ+Krav. 6 rings. 5/5 TripAdvisor.

item.title: Sor Klinmee Muay Thai Gym
item.description: Family-run authentic Thai camp, founded 2009 by Mit Klinmee. Home of Sudsakorn Sor Klinmee (278W/330F). Drop-ins ~฿200-300.

item.title: CrossFit Pattaya @ The Jungle Gym
item.description: Pattaya's only CrossFit affiliate. Multi-discipline: CrossFit + MMA + archery + dodgeball + slacklining. Coach Murray. UA & Decathlon partners.

item.title: Castra Gym
item.description: Relaxed atmosphere from bodybuilders to general fitness. East Pattaya location, less touristy.

item.title: Pattaya Country Club
item.description: 18-hole Pattaya Country Club at Khao Mai Kaeo — one of the closest golf courses to Pattaya proper with championship layout, mature parkland setting, and value-tier green fees.

item.title: Euro Badminton
item.description: East Pattaya multi-sport club on Soi Chaiyaphruek 2 with badminton courts, swimming pool, and on-site Thai-food restaurant — popular casual community venue.

item.title: Bean Cow Climbing Gym & Community Center
item.description: Family-friendly climbing gym. 8m wall. Top rope + lead climbing. CWA-certified teachers, belayer services, top rope safety classes.

item.title: Pattaya Hash House Harriers
item.description: First Pattaya hash, mixed running club since 1984. World's largest weekly running club. 'Drinking club with a running problem'.

item.title: Horseshoe Point Resort & Country Club
item.description: 1,500-acre equestrian + adventure mega-facility. International Riding School (est 1999). 5 indoor/outdoor arenas, 100+ horses (Lusitano, Appaloosa, Lipizzaner, Arabs, Warmbloods, Falabella, Thai pony). Polo. Paintball. Zipline. Mountain biking. Multi-sport field. Accommodation.

item.title: Golf Hub Pattaya (Indoor Simulator + Club Fitting)
item.description: Only premium indoor simulator + club fitting in Pattaya. TrackMan / GC Quad launch monitor. AC year-round practice. Multiple locations.

item.title: Thai Polo & Equestrian Club
item.description: Largest multi-functional polo + equestrian in all Asia. 250 hectares. 3 polo fields + 2 practice. 250+ stables. Endurance + Derby. Argentinian vet GM.

item.title: Pattaya Shooting Park
item.description: Largest outdoor shooting range in Pattaya. Diverse firearms (.22, .38, .45, 9mm, shotguns). Free hotel pickup in most packages.

item.title: Thai Wake Park Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya only cable wakeboarding park. Two lakes (beginner + advanced). All equipment included.

item.title: Pattaya Padel Club (Mabprachan Lake)
item.description: Lakeside padel courts on Mabprachan Reservoir. Pattaya second padel facility alongside Play Padel.

item.title: Pattaya Cycling Clubs (Cuore Masters / Monkey Xtreme / Jomtien Cycling)
item.description: Multiple road and MTB clubs. Cuore Masters Team + Monkey Xtreme + Jomtien Cycling + Pattaya MTB. Free to ฿2,000/year.

item.title: Cho Nateetong Thai Boxing Camp
item.description: Authentic budget Pattaya Muay Thai camp. ~฿270 per session. Combined weight gym + dedicated Muay Thai area. Patient trainers with good pad time.

item.title: Pattaya Public Running Routes & Parks (Beach + Mabprachan + City Parks)
item.description: Free public running guide. Pattaya Beach 5.8km, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan 4km loop, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue 1km, Chaiyapruek 400m track.

item.title: ATV & Off-Road Tours Pattaya (Multi-Operator)
item.description: Multiple ATV/Buggy/Enduro tour operators east of Pattaya. Polaris ATVs + 500cc CF MOTO + 660cc Buggies. Beginner to extreme tours. Hotel pickup free.
